title: Legends Style
description: Make your game look like Minecraft Legends
body:
Make your Minecraft world look like if it was Minecraft Legends. Many people don't like this game for some reason, but i really enjoyed it, and also it's art style. really vibrant and colorful. the best of all is that it keeps the essence of Minecraft.

Right now the only biome that looks good is the plains biome. I still need to change the grass colormap, wich isn't working for some reason.

**To-do**

These are some things I still need and want to add **(Not sure if in this order)**

⦁	Finish all main blocks **(and also blocks that are not in the game)**

⦁	Nether blocks

⦁	Mobs in legends style **(and maybe fresh animations compatibility)**

⦁	PBR custom compatible pack

⦁	Minecraft legends player model compatible with skins **(Am not sure if i have time to do this, i know it is possible but it will take a while)**
